billing.paid.title: Payment successful
billing.paid.text: Your subscription is active for 30 days. The plan updates in the background — if you still see the old plan, refresh the page in a minute.
billing.canceled: Payment canceled. You have not been charged.
billing.expiring.text: {date} — your subscription ends and you will be switched back to trial automatically.
billing.includes: Every plan includes the full feature set:
billing.renewNote: Renew your subscription by selecting a plan again.
billing.renewNoteStub: To renew or change your plan, email us.
billing.manageNote: Renewal is manual: select your plan again when the 30 days are up.
billing.manageNoteStub: To renew or change your plan, email us.
billing.builder.title: Builder
billing.builder.sub: Build a plan for your volume
